G1.name: 基础设施修复 + 激活
G1.description: ExecutionMode enum, config enable, auto-inference, old skills cleanup, SkillSelector wiring, Model Override

G2.name: execute_skill Tool + SubAgent Executor
G2.description: ExecuteSkillTool (KNOWLEDGE body injection, PLAYBOOK SubAgent spawn), SkillExecutionResult handling

G3.name: 内置 Skills + 自动同步
G3.description: 5 builtin skills (filesystem, web-search, code-review, code-debugger, readme-writer), SHA256 sync, system prompt injection

G4.name: CLI + TUI + 端到端验证
G4.description: CLI skill subcommands, TUI skill autocomplete, 15 e2e tests

phase_name: Phase V — Agent Skills 完整实现
key_decisions: KNOWLEDGE skills: body injected into system prompt, Agent follows instructions
PLAYBOOK skills: SubAgent spawned via SubAgentManager with isolated context + constrained tools
ExecutionMode auto-inference: extra files in skill dir → Playbook
SkillSelector: 4-phase pipeline (Gate→Score→Budget→Attenuate) wired into harness before Zone A
Model Override: active_skill.model replaces config.model before LLM call
Builtin skills embedded via include_str!() with SHA256 sync on startup
SlashCommand type changed to String for dynamic skill name support in TUI autocomplete

deferred.description: Dependency graph topo-sort wiring — no builtin skills use dependencies currently
deferred.precondition: When skills with inter-dependencies are added

deferred.description: Agent Debug Panel 重设计 — 信息整合到 StatusBar 后 Debug 面板需深入调整
deferred.precondition: Phase U G3 StatusBar 完成后

notes: Phase V COMPLETE. 11/12 tasks (V1-3 deferred). Skills system activated from dead code to running. 5 builtin skills, SkillSelector auto-select, Model Override, SubAgent-based Playbook execution, CLI commands, TUI autocomplete, 15 e2e tests. Tests: 2329→2370 (+41).
